rulings.Case Title: DIANE HALL et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Golden Gate Drywall, Inc'S Mo To Dismiss For Delay Of Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, June 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Westburne Supply, Inc¿s joinder in Golden Gate Drywall, Inc¿s motion to dismiss for delay of prosecution is denied as untimely. California Rules of Court 3.1342 prescribes no less than 45 days notice for a motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DIANA LAZARUS et al VS. A.B. BOYD CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Imo Industries, Inc.S Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, June 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. DEFENDANT SEPCO CORPORATION's Joinder In Defendant Imo Industries, Inc.'s Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens. Defendant IMO Industries Inc.¿s motion to dismiss or stay action for forum non conveniens is off calendar, including all joinders. The case is stayed per the June 3, 2010 order. = (220/HEK)
